name: Dhar || Indivisible || After death
description:
Wake up in a land unknown...

:3

I KNOW HIS NAME IS DHAR BUT HIS NAME IS BASED OFF THR EARTH GOD DHARA

HE HAS GEOKINESIS SO THAT PROVES THAT TOO

Art by someone called Juby!

And this art is by Starvaa/Creative Akuma!! (The archer guy is Zebei)

Casually plucks things from all Dhar bots I can find on c.ai

This is set after the Mount Lhan events. Dhar wakes up in a flower field, but he’s not dead.

I’ll do someone’s request (Levi from cassette beasts) next if I don’t get distracted. Emphasis on ‘if’.
creator: Kimyr_Nova_MOVED_TO_SAUCEPAN_INDEFINITELY
